headline: KKR Releases 2026 Mid-Year Global Macro Outlook
summary: NEW YORK, June 10, 2026--KKR, a leading global investment firm, today released "The Divergence Conundrum," the 2026 Mid-Year Global Macro Outlook by Henry McVey, CIO of KKR’s Balance Sheet and Head of Global Macro and Asset Allocation (GMAA).

raw.headline: KKR Releases 2026 Mid-Year Global Macro Outlook
raw.summary: NEW YORK, June 10, 2026--KKR, a leading global investment firm, today released "The Divergence Conundrum," the 2026 Mid-Year Global Macro Outlook by Henry McVey, CIO of KKR’s Balance Sheet and Head of Global Macro and Asset Allocation (GMAA).
